title: Superpose haemoglobin subunits
prompt: Load deoxyhaemoglobin (2HHB), turn on the superposition view so the globin subunits are structurally aligned, put it on a white background, and set it spinning.
notes: Tool-control task with no MVS analogue: structural alignment is an imperative viewer operation (the boolean superposition trait), not a describable scene node.
